checklist.item: Load Panchang & Festival View and select Itanagar.
checklist.expected: Renderer consumes AG74G active static result data and shows calculated-under-verification Panchang fields.
Renderer switches active static result records without falling back to legacy preview-only copy.
Renderer handles international timezone record from active static result data.
Old long pilot/preview/locked text remains absent from the public UI.
Unsupported input remains governed and does not trigger backend/runtime/API calls.
